{{CargoOrgan
|name=Eye of Chaos
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10699
|idx=57
|description="A pupil born of chaos, perceiving the essence and laws of all things. One day, it shall behold the end of chaos itself… and glimpse the truth of the Void!"
— Codex Draconis
|skill=Revive after death, restoring 8.6% of Max HP, and activate a 3-round Bloodthirsty, gaining +10% Lifesteal for each stack of Annihilation the enemy has!
|hp=2620
|def=230
|atk=222
|rush=354
|gene1=In Gene Sims, Water DMG +240
|gene2=In Gene Sims, Wind DMG +240
|gene3=Per Altar God Descent, {race} ATK +7
Gods Descended: 30/30
|gene4=In Gene Sims, Round 1 DMG +20%
|gene5=In Gene Sims, Ignore DEF +4%
|gene6=In Gene Sims, DMG +12%
|gene7=In Gene Sims, DMG +12% (Awakened)
|}}
